# Coronado Gold

> Fine gold jewelry brand based in Hialeah, Florida. Specializing in handcrafted 14k and 18k gold rings and necklaces.

## About

Coronado Gold is a fine jewelry brand offering handcrafted gold pieces — rings, necklaces, and more — made with precision and elegance. Located at 49 W 3rd St, Hialeah, FL 33010.

## Products

### Rings
- Brilliant Woven Ring — https://goldcoronado.com/products/brilliant-woven-ring/
- Coeur de Lumiere Ring — https://goldcoronado.com/products/coeur-de-lumiere-ring/
- Coeur de Lumiere Ring (Sophisticated Version) — https://goldcoronado.com/products/coeur-de-lumiere-ring-sophisticated-version/
- Coeur Noire de Lumiere Ring — https://goldcoronado.com/products/coeur-noire-de-lumiere-ring/
- Eclat de Lumiere Ring — https://goldcoronado.com/products/eclat-de-lumiere-ring/
- Feuille de Lumiere Ring — https://goldcoronado.com/products/feuille-de-lumiere-ring/
- Ghost de Lumiere Ring — https://goldcoronado.com/products/ghost-de-lumiere-ring/
- Infini de Lumiere Ring — https://goldcoronado.com/products/infini-de-lumiere-ring/
- Intertwined Hearts Ring — https://goldcoronado.com/products/intertwined-hearts-ring/
- Lumiere Knot Ring — https://goldcoronado.com/products/lumiere-knot-ring/
- Ruche de Lumiere Ring — https://goldcoronado.com/products/ruche-de-lumiere-ring/
- Trefle de Lumiere Ring — https://goldcoronado.com/products/trefle-de-lumiere-ring/

### Necklaces
- Golden Pearls Necklace — https://goldcoronado.com/products/cadena-perlas-doradas/
- Lumiere Drop Necklace — https://goldcoronado.com/products/cadena-gota-lumiere/
- Brilliant Halo Necklace — https://goldcoronado.com/products/cadena-halo-brillante/
- Lumiere Heart Necklace — https://goldcoronado.com/products/cadena-corazon-lumiere/
